texto: He came to read; two or three booksare lying open: history and poetry.But after just ten minutes of readinghe lets them drop. There on the sofahe falls asleep. He truly is devoted to reading-but he is twenty-three years old, and very handsome.And just this afternoon, Eros surged within his perfect limbs and on his lips.Into his beautiful flesh came the heat of passion, and there was no foolish embarrassment about the form that pleasure took..
explicacao: Citação de C.P Cavafy sobre temas ligados a amor. “He came to read; two or three booksare lying open: history and poetry.But after just ten minutes …” articula amor, cavafy, eros em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como eros e gay.
